name: PAX Charging Tray
summary: The PAX Charging Tray offers a contemporary solution for charging your PAX 2, PAX 3, PAX Mini or Pax Plus vaporiser.
description: The PAX Charging Tray offers a contemporary solution for charging your PAX 2, PAX 3, PAX Mini or Pax Plus vaporiser. Its streamlined and compact design is perfectly tailored for seamless integration. Compatible with the PAX USB Charger (sold separately). *Due to the use of natural materials, the colour and appearance of the product may vary. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
